language.title: Choose your language
language.subtitle: You can change this later in Settings.
language.reloadMessage: The app needs to restart to switch text direction.

auth.phoneSubtitle: We'll send you a verification code.
auth.registerSubtitle: Just a few details to finish.
auth.notADriver: This account is not registered as a driver.
auth.notADriverDesc: Please contact support if you believe this is a mistake.
auth.noDriverAccountDesc: There is no driver account for this number. Please contact support to be registered as a driver.

availability.title: Availability
availability.onlineDesc: You're visible to nearby orders and streaming your location.
availability.offlineDesc: You will not receive new delivery requests.
availability.locationPermissionDesc: Meryata Souq Driver needs your location to go online and receive delivery requests.
availability.locationPermissionDenied: Location permission was denied. Enable it in Settings to go online.
availability.hasActiveOrder: Finish your active delivery before going offline.

requests.title: Incoming Requests
requests.emptyOffline: Go online to see delivery requests.
requests.emptyActiveOrder: Finish your current delivery to see new requests.
requests.acceptError: Failed to accept this order. Please try again.

activeOrder.title: Active Delivery
activeOrder.emptyDesc: Accept a request to start a delivery.
activeOrder.navigationFailed: Could not open a navigation app.
activeOrder.backgroundPermissionDenied: Allow location access "Always" so customers can track your delivery even when the app is closed.

profile.title: Profile
profile.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out?
